Door.Access.Door8800.Command.Data.TimeGroup

类 WeekTimeGroup

  • java.lang.Object
    • Door.Access.Door8800.Command.Data.TimeGroup.WeekTimeGroup
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    INData
    直接已知子类:
    WeekTimeGroup_ReaderWork

    public class WeekTimeGroup
extends java.lang.Object
implements INData
    表示一个完整时段，一个时段里包含7天
